summary: Comprehensive testing of Guardian Self-Registration feature completed. All 12 backend API tests passed. All UI tests passed including registration flow, form validation, redirect to dashboard, success toast, and regression tests for existing login flows.
critical_code_review_comments: Registration endpoint correctly creates user with role='guardian' only
Password validation correctly enforces minimum 8 characters (422 for shorter)
Duplicate email returns 409 with clear error message
Missing required fields (email, password, full_name) return 422
Phone field is optional as designed
JWT token returned on successful registration for auto-login
Newly registered users can immediately access /api/dashboard/summary
Newly registered guardians correctly blocked from operator endpoints (403)
Note: full_name from RegisterRequest is NOT stored in DB - only email, password_hash, role, phone are persisted (intentional per design)
All registration form data-testid attributes present and functional
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during pytest with pattern pytest-*@test.com and e2e-*@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guardian self-registration fully functional. The full_name field is accepted by API but NOT stored in users table (only email, password_hash, role, phone, preferred_channels stored). Test users created in DB from e2e tests: pytest-reg-*, pytest-nophone-*, pytest-access-*, pytest-login-*, e2e-test-*, e2e-ui-test-*, e2e-op-test-*. Existing users from manual testing: newguardian@test.com, priya.sharma@test.com.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/auth/register with valid data returns 201 + JWT + role=guardian
Newly registered user can login via POST /api/auth/login
Newly registered user can access GET /api/dashboard/summary (200)
Newly registered guardian cannot access operator endpoints (403)
frontend_ui_tests: Login page shows 'New guardian? Create an account' link (data-testid: go-to-register-btn)
Clicking register link shows registration form
Registration form has all required fields: name, email, phone, password, confirm password
All form fields have correct data-testid attributes
Submitting valid registration redirects to /family dashboard
Success toast 'Account created! Welcome to Nagarik.' appears
'Already have an account? Sign in' link (data-testid: back-to-login-btn) returns to login
Existing guardian login still works → redirects to /family (regression)
Existing operator login still works → redirects to /operator (regression)

verified_features: Registration returns JWT for immediate auto-login
New guardians can access dashboard API
New guardians blocked from operator APIs (RBAC)
Frontend registration form with all fields
Navigation between login and register forms
